kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollBy(0, -200) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="3a4dfd05cc954ed5f31733dbe4b21f5d", element="f.C57577B2A410A69279D399821B6DEC9D.d.93DD2B7EE14841D28639C9A6AB58EB4E.e.40")>'

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
